message: Offering a lovely And White Sweater (outerwear) — cozy zigzag knit, great condition. Looking to swap for a dress or a pair of bottoms. Serious traders welcome.
Howdy, partners. Listing set_05_duke_tops_01: And Blue Blouse. I’m lookin’ to swap for bottoms or dresses in good shape. Firm but fair, no fuss.
[swap rejected: target set_05_kade_dresses_01 is not a listing]
Hi everyone — listing set_05_jade_bottoms_01: And Tan Pants, in nice wearable condition. I’m especially hoping to swap for a dress. Thanks for taking a look!
Holding for now — watching for dress listings to come up. My And White Sweater is still available for a dress or bottoms swap.
Offer set_05_kade_dresses_01 for your outerwear in lst_001.
Deal, Kade! The Brown Floral Dress for my And White Sweater — happy to swap. Thanks for the clean, quick offer.

Listing set_05_lin_outerwear_01: Orange Cardigan Sweater. Warm, vivid, and with a little autumn philosophy in its weave. I’m open to thoughtful swaps for tops or bottoms, especially pieces with real staying power.
All set on my end — swapped my And White Sweater for Kade's Brown Floral Dress. I'm out of tradeable inventory now, so I'll close out. Thanks, everyone!
Hi Jade! Your set_05_jade_bottoms_01 tan pants look really wearable, and I think my set_05_mira_tops_01 Yellow Top could pair nicely with them. Would you be interested in a straight swap?
Wrapped up — happy with my swap. No further trades for me. Best of luck to all!
Hi Lin! I love the look of your set_05_lin_outerwear_01 Orange Cardigan Sweater. I’d be happy to swap my set_05_nola_bottoms_01 Sweater And Jeans for it if that works for you!
